Asangoham.finding: 'The [Secret/Ancient/Bizarre] Of [Topic]' formula dominates. 'The' start +24%. Reuses winning patterns with number swaps. 18 min sweet spot.

both_agree_on: Channel size doesn't limit breakout potential
Consistent schedule matters more than frequency
they_differ_on: Duration: ESOTERICA 38 min sweet spot, Asangoham 18 min
Title formula: ESOTERICA varies fresh questions, Asangoham reuses templates
cross_channel_insights.recommendation: Hybrid approach — question titles for broad topics (ESOTERICA style), 'The [X] Of [Y]' formula for niche subjects (Asangoham style). Target 20-30 min, 4-5 videos/month.
